rows.notes: Clear, large heading at top-left. No monetary amounts in the £/s/d columns. Vertical column alignment not required for header.
Second line of the multi-line header. Handwriting legible (surname spelled 'Biddulph, Cocks & Ridge' as shown). No amounts present.
Amount clearly aligned in the £/s/d columns as 19.3.8. This row was listed as a strong alignment reference in the page guidance; digits are crisp and within valid ranges.
Amount reads 9.16.6 in the £/s/d columns and matches the guidance reference. Column boundaries were set using reference rows; all currency fields validate (shillings <20, pence <12).
Amount reads 19.3.8 and aligns with the same column positions as Row 3 (used as an alignment anchor). Clear digits, all currency rules satisfied.
Amount reads 9.16.6 in the £/s/d columns. Matches the other 'Do on 546' line (Row 4) and the page guidance reference; digits and alignment are clear.

This row on the page is shown as '58-4' (58 shillings, 4 pence) — a non-standard shillings value. Per page guidance I converted 58s 4d to the normalized amount 2 pounds 18 shillings 4 pence for the £/s/d fields. The original written form was clear ('58-4') but required conversion to fit currency columns; vertical alignment is slightly uncertain due to faint ruling lines, hence less than perfect confidence.

rows.description: Rate of the Fund for Advowsons
rows.notes: Top line of a multi-line section header. Handwriting legible; no amounts in the right-hand columns. Used as section label introducing the following entries.
Continuation of the section header (multi-line). Text reads 'in the 3 pr Cent reduced' as shown. No monetary amounts; handwriting clear enough to be confident.

Monetary value (2576.10.7) appears embedded in the descriptive text rather than in the right-hand £/s/d columns. I preserved the value inside the description and did not extract it into the columns. Handwriting for the embedded number is legible but slightly cramped, so moderate confidence.

Embedded monetary value (66.17.6) occurs inside the line of description (not in the £/s/d columns). The wording 'with one years Div' is legible but slightly abbreviated; value retained in description per page guidance.
Single-word descriptive prefix that links to the amount on the next line (Row 13). No amount in the columns on this line; placement and relation to Row 13 are clear from handwriting and layout.

Amount 99.8.10 is clearly written in the £/s/d columns and was explicitly called out in the page guidance as a strong alignment reference. Treated as a calculated subtotal (the 'making' amount). All currency fields validate.
Standalone final amount on the page (2576.7.5). Page guidance flagged this as a strong reference row; digits and column alignment are clear. Treated as a total/final balance.

rows.description: N.B. Dividend viz 34.15.7 not yet invested.
rows.notes: Descriptive note with embedded monetary value (34.15.7) contained within the text rather than in the £/s/d columns. Handwriting for the embedded number is legible; the phrase 'not yet invested' is readable. Value left in description per instructions.
